privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data. The agent is required to update a SolveSpace model representing an L-shaped duct elbow cross-section based on an ECR document (ECR-HVAC-2247). The old dimensions encoded in the initial file (total width=250.0mm, total height=200.0mm, leg height=100.0mm, and wall thickness=50.0mm) must be updated to new dimensions (300.0mm, 240.0mm, 130.0mm, and 70.0mm respectively) with a ±0.5 mm tolerance. The updated model must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/duct_elbow_updated.slvs and exported to a DXF file at /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/duct_elbow_updated.dxf.
